channels.name: po-commands
channels.purpose: Product Owner issues tasks, STOP commands, and overrides

channels.name: pm-tasks
channels.purpose: Emma posts assignments, progress summaries, and blockers

channels.name: architecture
channels.purpose: Morgan posts design decisions, ADRs, and review requests

channels.name: dev-updates
channels.purpose: Sean posts PR links, test results, and build status

channels.name: loop-alerts
channels.purpose: Loop detection alerts — PO approval required to continue

po_command_routing.description: Commands sent to non-#po-commands channels are acknowledged in the original channel and routed to #po-commands for audit logging
